features.feature_name: Python MCP Deps: httpx + sse-starlette + starlette + uvicorn

features.feature_name: Python Dev Deps: pytest + pytest-asyncio + pytest-cov + pytest-mock + ruff + mypy + pre-commit + pip-audit + ipython

features.name: Python Project Metadata: requires-python >= 3.11
features.description: pyproject.toml requires-python = '>=3.11' 설정 (BGE-M3/Pydantic v2 호환)

features.name: Security Audit Tools Configuration
features.description: npm audit, cargo audit, pip-audit, GitHub Dependabot 보안 감사 설정

features.name: Config Section: [core] - ORANGE CORE Settings
features.description: [core] TOML 섹션 구현 - autonomy_level, default_execution_mode, max_decision_timeout_ms, single_decision_lock, pipeline_stages

features.name: Config Section: [llm] - LLM Model Settings
features.description: [llm] TOML 섹션 구현 - mini_model, main_model, fallback_model, temperature, max_tokens, streaming_enabled, prompt_cache_enabled, prompt_cache_ttl_sec

features.name: Config Section: [embedding] - Embedding Settings
features.description: [embedding] TOML 섹션 구현 - model, dimension, matryoshka_dim, batch_size, local_enabled

features.name: Config Section: [vector_db] - Vector DB Settings
features.description: [vector_db] TOML 섹션 구현 - backend, mode, collection_name, persist_directory, similarity_metric

features.name: Config Section: [graph_db] - Graph DB Settings
features.description: [graph_db] TOML 섹션 구현 - backend, json_path, max_hops, scope, cache_enabled

features.name: Config Section: [storage] - Storage Settings
features.description: [storage] TOML 섹션 구현 - backend, db_path, log_format, log_path, backup_enabled/schedule/retain_count, memory_ttl_L0~L3

features.name: Config Section: [cost] - Cost Budget Settings
features.description: [cost] TOML 섹션 구현 - daily_limit, monthly_limit, warn_threshold, block_threshold, downshift_model, currency, tracking_enabled

features.name: Config Section: [guardrails] - Guardrails Settings
features.description: [guardrails] TOML 섹션 구현 - layer1~4_enabled/provider, layer4_schedule, fail_policy, sensitive_types

features.name: Config Section: [mcp] - MCP Settings
features.description: [mcp] TOML 섹션 구현 - transport (streamable_http LOCK), default_timeout_ms, max_retries, bridges[]

features.name: Config Section: [rbac] - RBAC Settings
features.description: [rbac] TOML 섹션 구현 - default_role, roles (OWNER/ADMIN/OPERATOR/VIEWER permissions)

features.name: Config Section: [rate_limit] - Rate Limit Settings
features.description: [rate_limit] TOML 섹션 구현 - enabled, targets[] (target_id, rpm, tpm, burst_allowance, cooldown_sec)

features.name: Config Section: [logging] - Logging Settings
features.description: [logging] TOML 섹션 구현 - level, format, trace_id_required, sinks[] with sink configs

features.name: Config Section: [semantic_cache] - Semantic Cache Settings
features.description: [semantic_cache] TOML 섹션 구현 - enabled, similarity_threshold (>=0.95 LOCK), max_entries, ttl_sec

features.name: Config Section: [self_check] - Self-check Thresholds (LOCK)
features.description: [self_check] TOML 섹션 구현 - threshold_p0=70, threshold_p1=75, threshold_p2=80, soft_loop_max=1 (all LOCK)

features.name: Config Section: [approval] - Approval Timeout (LOCK)
features.description: [approval] TOML 섹션 구현 - timeout_s=600, p2_timeout_s=300 (all LOCK)

features.name: Config Section: [blue_nodes] - Blue Node Cap Settings
features.description: [blue_nodes] TOML 섹션 구현 - active_node_cap=3, candidate_node_cap=5, cap_exceeded_action=reuse
features.feature_name: Config Section: [blue_nodes] - Blue Node Cap Settings

features.name: Config Section: [ui] - UI Layout Settings
features.description: [ui] TOML 섹션 구현 - min_width=1280, default_width=1440, default_height=900, font_family

features.name: Environment Variables (.env) Spec
features.description: .env 환경 변수 정의 - 공통(6), LLM API 키(4), 외부 서비스(8) 총 18개 변수 + .env.example 템플릿

features.name: Config Version Presets (V1/V2/V3)
features.description: config.v1.toml/config.v2.toml/config.v3.toml 버전별 프리셋 파일 생성

features.name: Pydantic v2 VamosConfig Model Implementation
features.description: VamosConfig 최상위 Pydantic v2 ConfigModel 구현 (13 sub-models + validators VAL-001~VAL-010)

features.name: Config Loading Flow Implementation
features.description: 설정 로딩 흐름 구현 - load_dotenv -> tomli.load -> VamosConfig Pydantic 검증 -> (V2+: DB 오버라이드)
